law: This sample demonstrates how to use the APIs, and how to handle Watch Connectivity background tasks.
Use a physical iPhone and Apple Watch to test this sample code project.
For example, if the iOS app target uses , the watchOS app and widget targets must use and , respectively.
The reply handler runs asynchronously on a background thread, and returns quickly to avoid timeout.
Apps can use to retrieve the number of remaining times.
When using Watch Connectivity, apps must complete every background task ( ).
